docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $918.10 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, ASTRID L. IND & DBA THE LATIN BROS. LTD/ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
